feedback: The app keeps crashing whenever I try to open the checkout page. This is extremely frustrating and I've lost two orders because of it.
Love the new dashboard design! It's so much cleaner and easier to navigate.
Billing is a mess. I was charged twice for the same subscription and support took 5 days to respond.
Delivery was super fast, arrived in 2 days instead of the expected 5. Really impressed!
The search feature doesn't work on mobile. I type something and nothing shows up.
Can you add dark mode? My eyes hurt when I use the app at night.
App crashed again. Third time this week. I'm switching to a competitor if this doesn't get fixed.
Great product overall. The onboarding flow is a bit confusing but once you figure it out, it's solid.
My refund hasn't processed after 3 weeks. Opened 4 tickets. No response. This is unacceptable.
The notifications are broken on Android. I'm not getting any alerts for new messages.
Checkout experience is seamless. Saved my card details and it's one-tap now. Love it.
Why is the app 500MB? Way too large for what it does. Please optimize.
I accidentally hit the delete button and lost all my data. There should be a confirmation prompt.
The filter options on the product page are really helpful. Makes finding things so much easier.
App crashes when I rotate my screen. iOS 17, iPhone 14 Pro.
मुझे यह ऐप बहुत पसंद है। बहुत अच्छा काम करता है।
Ok
Support team was incredibly helpful. Resolved my issue in under 10 minutes. 5 stars!
The price is too high compared to competitors. I'm considering cancelling my subscription.
Payment failed three times but I could see money was deducted. Scary experience.
Dark mode would be amazing. Please add it soon. Also the font is a bit small for me.
The app is great for the most part but I wish the search was smarter. Sometimes I search for something obvious and it gives me irrelevant results.
Order tracking is broken. Shows my order as pending even though it arrived yesterday.
